# teams app rsc add

Add an RSC permission to an app

## Usage

```
teams app rsc add <teamsAppId> <permission> --type <Application|Delegated>
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description | Required |
|----------|-------------|----------|
| `teamsAppId` | Teams app ID | Yes |
| `permission` | RSC permission name (e.g. ChannelMessage.Read.Group) | Yes |

## Options

| Option | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `--type <type>` | Permission type: Application or Delegated |
| `--json` | [OPTIONAL] Output as JSON |
<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
